description.name: Ático Dorado
description.headline: Rooftop Penthouse with Sea Views — Flexible Check-In Any Time!
description.description: Check in whenever it suits you — we offer completely flexible arrival and departure, 24 hours a day. This top-floor apartment overlooks the bay with a private rooftop terrace and sea views. Two bedrooms sleep up to four guests.

reviews: The views from the rooftop terrace are stunning. Great location.
Late check-in was no problem at all — the host was very accommodating.
Beautiful apartment. The terrace is the highlight. Would have liked slightly more kitchen equipment.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 72 hours before check-in.
